calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Two Minors.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Petitioner Stephanie Peterson (Mother), was present in pro per as guardian ad litem for and with the minors Brady Peterson Rowe and Kennedy Peterson Rowe, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by co-petitioner/minor's father Justin Rowe, but signed the petition consenting to the name change of the minors.
Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name of a minors were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minors to Brady Rowe Peterson and Kennedy Rowe Peterson.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Reset To Aug-16-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Off Calendar
